issue.message: Do not hardcode "/sdcard/"; use `Environment.getExternalStorageDirectory().getPath()` instead
issue.errorLine1: private File goldFile = new File("/sdcard" + soundPath + "/gold.wav");

issue.message: Do not hardcode "/sdcard/"; use `Environment.getExternalStorageDirectory().getPath()` instead
issue.errorLine1: private File silverFile = new File("/sdcard" + soundPath + "/silver.wav");

Fixed screen orientations will be ignored in most cases, starting from Android 16. Android is moving toward a model where apps are expected to adapt to various orientations, display sizes, and aspect ratios.

Fixed screen orientations will be ignored in most cases, starting from Android 16. Android is moving toward a model where apps are expected to adapt to various orientations, display sizes, and aspect ratios.

Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. `R.foo.bar`) than by name (e.g. `getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)`).

Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. `R.foo.bar`) than by name (e.g. `getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)`).

Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. `R.foo.bar`) than by name (e.g. `getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)`).

Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. `R.foo.bar`) than by name (e.g. `getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)`).

Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. `R.foo.bar`) than by name (e.g. `getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)`).
As of Android 12, `android:exported` must be set; use `true` to make the activity available to other apps, and `false` otherwise. For launcher activities, this should be set to `true`.
As of Android 12, `android:exported` must be set; use `true` to make the activity available to other apps, and `false` otherwise.
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 24
Missing density variation folders in `src\main\res`: drawable-hdpi, drawable-mdpi, drawable-xxhdpi
Custom view ``LinearLayout`` has `setOnTouchListener` called on it but does not override `performClick`
`onTouch` should call `View#performClick` when a click is detected
issue.errorLine1: public boolean onTouch(View v, MotionEvent event) {

issue.message: Missing `contentDescription` attribute on image
Missing `contentDescription` attribute on image
`@id/textDeviceName` can overlap `@id/menu_buttons` if @id/textDeviceName grows due to localized text expansion
